title: Government Standard Contracts for Procurement
body: "This page brings together the various template contracts owned by the Cabinet Office, and updated by the Government Legal Department.   Each contract has a separate page, containing the template contract, guidance documents, and lists of changes between different versions.   If you have any feedback on the use of these contracts, would like a copy of any of the previous versions, or have any queries, please email modelservicescontract@cabinetoffice.gov.uk. "
